plugins.name: commit-message
plugins.description: Generate a conventional commit message by analyzing staged git changes

plugins.name: copilot-review
plugins.description: Single-pass Copilot review check-fix cycle, use with /loop to repeat

plugins.name: prompt-audit
plugins.description: Audit a prompt for completeness against the 6 essential elements before sending it to Claude

plugins.name: pr-prepare
plugins.description: Prepare a structured PR description that discloses AI authorship, classifies change impact, and runs the pre-submit checklist

plugins.name: plan-feature
plugins.description: Plan a feature before writing any code by clarifying goals, exploring the codebase, and producing a plan.md handoff document

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Review a PR with rigor calibrated to leaf vs core classification, validating PR description, anti-patterns, and verification depth
